response.original_title: The Making of Gerry Anderson A life Uncharted Behind The Scenes
response.overview: Discover even more insights about Gerry Anderson's life in this behind-the-scenes look at how A Life Uncharted was made. Through interviews and commentary from friends, family, fans and colleagues, unravel even more about the genius creator.
response.title: The Making of Gerry Anderson A life Uncharted Behind The Scenes
